Foreign: لا أَحَد يَحْتاج إِلى كُلّ هٰذِهِ ٱلْبَدَلات.

English: Is there a blouse with long sleeves?
This activity will be good for my father.
We will rent a big apartment together.
Where do you want to go?
How do you obtain cash in Cuba?
Foreign: كَيْف تَحْصُلين عَلى ٱلْنُّقود في كوبا؟

English: In the world there are a lot of stunning countries, my son.
Foreign: في ٱلْعالَم بِلاد رائِعة كَثيرة يا ٱبْني.

English: I will not travel to a lot of countries this year.
Foreign: لَنْ أُسافِر إِلى بِلاد كَثيرة هٰذِهِ ٱلْسَّنة.

English: I do not want a short trip.
Do you want to take the plane?
He wants to travel to more countries.
In Egypt, there are stunning views.
We do not want to rent a car.
